description_long: This is a slip-on shoe featuring a vibrant, multicolored woven textile upper with a geometric pattern. The dominant colors are magenta, white, gold, and teal, with a central sunburst motif on the toe area. The shoe has a low-profile, flat brown sole and a rounded toe, with no visible laces or fasteners. The interior appears to be lined with a light tan material, likely synthetic or leather for comfort. The sides display intricate zigzag and diamond patterns, adding to the artisanal aesthetic. The overall construction suggests a lightweight, flexible shoe suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A colorful slip-on shoe with a woven geometric pattern, magenta and white tones, and a flat brown sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the magenta and teal geometric pattern and the flat brown sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white sunburst motif on the toe and the rounded shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar geometric patterns and visible stitching details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the heel area with a diamond pattern and the open slip-on design.
